description_long: This is a classic, boxy van with a vibrant lime green paint job and distinctive graffiti-style artwork along its sides, featuring cartoonish characters and bold text. The van has a flat roof, large rectangular windows on both sides, and a prominent black-tinted windshield and rear window. The front displays a large, circular emblem and a white bumper, while the rear features a license plate and simple tail lights. The wheels are small and silver, with black tires, and the van's bodywork is mostly smooth with some visible seams for doors and panels. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage camper vans popular in the 1970s, with a playful, urban twist due to the graffiti. The van appears to be made primarily of metal, with glass windows and rubber tires, and is likely hollow inside to accommodate passengers or cargo.
description: A lime green, graffiti-covered vintage van with large windows, a flat roof, and a boxy shape. The van features cartoonish artwork, silver wheels, and a prominent front emblem.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left side of the van, highlighting the graffiti artwork, large side windows, and two visible wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the black-tinted rear window, license plate, and simple tail lights, with the green paint extending across the back.
description_view_2: Side view of the right side, similar to the left, with more graffiti artwork and large windows, emphasizing the van's length.
description_view_3: Front view showing the large windshield, circular emblem, white bumper, and hints of the graffiti above the grille.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
